subject: refactor(theme): remove CSS variable bridge — use DaisyUI tokens directly
body:
Replace all 362 bridge variable references with direct DaisyUI tokens
across 14 CSS files. The bridge layer (--color-bg → --color-base-100,
--color-surface → --color-base-200, etc.) added unnecessary indirection.

Mapping applied:
  --color-bg → --color-base-100
  --color-surface → --color-base-200
  --color-surface-hover → --color-base-300
  --color-border → --color-base-300
  --color-text → --color-base-content
  --color-text-muted → color-mix(in oklab, --color-base-content 60%, transparent)
  --color-danger → --color-error
  --color-accent → --color-warning
  --color-label-bg → color-mix(in oklab, --color-primary 20%, transparent)
  --color-label-text → --color-primary-content
  --color-primary-hover → color-mix(in oklab, --color-primary 80%, white)
  --color-success-hover → color-mix(in oklab, --color-success 80%, white)
  --radius → --radius-box (DaisyUI native)

The :root bridge block is removed. Only --header-height remains.

Tags: theme, daisyui, refactor, bridge-removal
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: medium
Debt: paid
